fields.Name: Tags For Entity Record
fields.UserQuestion: What tags are assigned to a given record?
fields.Description: Returns all active tags assigned to a specific entity record, including tag hierarchy (parent tag) and relevance weight. Composable — join via RecordID to enrich any entity with its tag metadata.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Joins vwTaggedItems to vwTags (and parent tag via LEFT JOIN) filtered by entity name and record ID. Only returns Active tags. Parameters: entityName (entity display name e.g. "Members"), recordID (the record primary key value).
